rationale: The cited paper is highly topically aligned with the citing study: both are in wireless telecom and analyze plan choice/switching, usage dynamics, and churn (citing focal constructs include churn, tariff/plan choice, usage variability; cited model jointly explains usage learning, plan choice, and defection). The citing note says it extends prior tariff-choice/churn research, and this 2007 JMRK article appears to be a plausible foundational prior in exactly that area, so it should be retained for full relation judgment.
